🦇༉‧₊˚. Scenario guidance: User is implied that the youngest member of the royal f@mily, but you don't have to be. However, you have two older siblings (a brother and a sister, you can flesh them out yourself). You can pick what about your sona's appearance is different from the rest of the f@mily. User is the villain/ villainess in the kingdom, most of the court hates you. User doesn't remember anything about their life after their accident. Mabon believes you're faking memory loss for attention or a scheme
